calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Off Calendar
Progress Report On The Sale Of The Real Property, And For Entry Of Final Judgment.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2020 Continued To May-19-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Suzzane Canton.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Keri Crittenton, CSR #6914. Telephone: 415-551-0609. Email: kcrittenton@sftc.org.

Alfonso Luis Poire, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Nancy Munoz who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Suzzane Canton.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Partition of Real Property was filed on March 20, 2019.
Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents were personally served on defendant Suzzane Canton, on January 23, 2020.
Default as to defendant Suzzane Canton, was entered on March 3, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed with prejudice on June 25, 2020.
Memorandum of Costs was filed on August 12, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) Plaintiff Nancy Munoz and defendant Suzzane Canton are owners of the real property commonly known as 10 Bronte Street, San Francisco, California 94110;
(2) Plaintiff Nancy Munoz is authorized to list and sell the real property described above, using a broker, agent and title company, of plaintiff's choice;
(3) Plaintiff Nancy Munoz is expressly permitted and authorized to deduct from the gross proceeds resulting from the sale of the property the following amount:
Damages/Principal - $ 18,136.00
Attorney Fees - $ 13,100.00
Costs - $ 4,125.00
Total - $ 35,361.00
(4) Plaintiff Nancy Munoz and defendant Suzzane Canton shall equally divide the remaining sale proceeds resulting from the sale of the real property at 10 Bronte Street, San Francisco, California 94110, after the deductions from defendant's portion as set forth above.

Matter is CONTINUED to April 8, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Sale of the Real Property, and for Entry of Final Judgment.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Interlocutory Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
